join_order.probe: orders(filtered by o_orderdate < 1995-03-15 via zonemap-pruned sequential scan)
join_order.notes: Build a dense customer-key bitset from customer_segment_postings and test o_custkey during the sequential orders scan.

join_order.build: orders(filtered by customer bitset and o_orderdate < 1995-03-15)
join_order.notes: Materialize a dense qualifying-order bitmap plus o_orderdate and o_shippriority arrays keyed by o_orderkey, then probe them with l_orderkey during a sequential lineitem scan.

scan.table: customer(filtered via postings) -> orders(sequential zonemap-pruned scan) -> lineitem(sequential sorted scan)
scan.access_pattern: sequential on orders blocks with zone-map pruning, then sequential on lineitem in physical l_orderkey order with direct-array probes into qualifying-order state

data_structures.fact_join: dense_bitset(15000001 order keys) + flat_array(orderdate, shippriority by order key) + zone_map(orders_orderdate_zonemap)
data_structures.aggregation: sorted_group_by with streaming per-order accumulator + fixed_min_heap(10) per thread

indexes.purpose: enumerate BUILDING customer rowids without scanning customer
skip non-qualifying orders blocks before touching order payload columns
derive order-key partition boundaries so each thread scans a contiguous lineitem row range without splitting groups

optimization_notes: Root cause: Category B physical implementation mismatch. The current plan already removed most logical waste, but it still reaches qualifying lineitems through the cache-exceeding lineitem_order_postings rowid structure and late random payload fetches, which is a poor fit for a 60M-row fact table that is already physically sorted by l_orderkey. Replace that with a two-pass sequential design: zonemap-pruned orders scan builds a dense qualifying-order bitmap plus payload arrays keyed by o_orderkey, then a partitioned sequential lineitem scan filters l_shipdate, probes the dense order state by l_orderkey, and performs streaming sorted aggregation per order before thread-local top-k merge.
